`rg` is not installed in this environment, so I’m using `grep`/`find`. The worktree is already dirty in several of the exact files this ticket touches, so I’m reading the current diffs before editing to preserve existing work.

{
  "name": "relay",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Local-first Codex-driven kanban desktop app.",
  "main": "./out/main/index.js",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "dev:logs": "electron-vite dev 2>&1 | tee /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "build": "tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build",
    "clean:dist": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs --clean",
    "package:binary": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs",
    "dist": "npm run clean:dist && npm run build && npm run package:binary",
    "logs": "mkdir -p \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay\" && touch \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\" && tail -n 200 -f \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\"",
    "logs:dev": "touch /tmp/relay-dev.log && tail -n 200 -f /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",
    "test": "node tests/run-tests.mjs",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1",
    "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0",
    "@dnd-kit/utilities": "^3.2.2",
    "@openai/codex-sdk": "^0.130.0",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "effect": "4.0.0-beta.65",
    "gray-matter": "^4.0.3",
    "lucide-react": "^0.468.0",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "ulid": "^2.3.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.10.2",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.2",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.2",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.4",
    "electron": "^33.2.1",
    "electron-vite": "^2.3.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

I found the current normalizer still converts MCP tool calls into message deltas and ignores `todo_list`. I’m going to add minimal structured payloads at the shared type/schema layer, then swap the normalizer over to those payloads and teach the renderer labels how to describe them.
I’m editing the shared event contract first. The new payloads will intentionally keep only todo text/completion state and MCP call metadata plus an optional error string.

The shared schema now accepts `todo.updated` and `mcp.tool_call` while keeping log payloads JSON-friendly. Next I’m replacing the SDK item handling so MCP results and arguments are not copied into the run log.
The normalizer now emits structured events for both SDK item types. I’m updating the progress utility text next because those strings also feed run-event de-duplication keys.
The renderer now has labels, text, and tones for todo and MCP events. I’m adding tests at the schema, renderer, and mocked backend stream layers to lock in the persistence behavior.
The focused tests are in place. I’m running the full suite first, then typecheck, and I’ll separate failures caused by these changes from any pre-existing worktree issues if they appear.
`npm test` passed. I’m running TypeScript now; this is the stricter check for the new event union and fake SDK stream shapes.
Typecheck passed. I’m doing a final diff pass over only the files I touched so the handoff can distinguish this ticket’s changes from the pre-existing dirty worktree.

payload.text:
**Summary**
Implemented structured Relay events for SDK todo-list updates and MCP tool calls. Todo events persist only `{ text, completed }` items, and MCP events persist server/tool/status plus optional error without arguments or result payloads. Renderer progress utilities now show clear labels, text, and tones for both event types.

**Files Changed**
- [types.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/shared/types.ts)
- [schemas.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/main/services/schemas.ts)
- [index.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/main/services/codex/index.ts)
- [agentProgress.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/lib/agentProgress.ts)
- [backend.test.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/tests/backend.test.ts)
- [schemas.test.ts](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/tests/schemas.test.ts)
- [agent-progress.test.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/tests/agent-progress.test.tsx)

**Commands Run**
- `git status --short`
- `grep`/`sed`/`nl` inspections for event types, schemas, normalizer, and tests
- `npm test`
- `npm run typecheck`

**Tests**
- `npm test`: passed, 99 tests
- `npm run typecheck`: passed

**Remaining Risks / Follow-Up**
The worktree already had unrelated dirty files and `.relay` run/ticket artifacts before this change; I left those untouched. No known remaining follow-up for this ticket.
